parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "project_id": "{{ $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.project_id }}",
  "total_pages": {{ $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.pages_count }},
  "total_links": {{ $json.links_count }},
  "clusters_count": {{ $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.clusters_count }},
  "type_distribution": {{ JSON.stringify($json.type_distribution || {}) }},
  "reciprocal_ratio": {{ $json.reciprocal_ratio || 0 }},
  "orphan_count": {{ ($json.orphan_check?.orphans || []).length }},
  "avg_incoming": {{ $json.graph_stats?.avg_incoming || 0 }},
  "hallucination_rate": {{ $json.hallucination_rate || 0 }},
  "pagerank_concentration": {{ $json.pagerank_concentration || 0 }},
  "pagerank_leak_count": {{ ($json.pagerank_leaks || []).length }}
}

={
  "workflow": "NN_07_Перелинковка_v4.0",
  "severity": "{{ $json.gate_decision === 'reject' ? 'critical' : 'warning' }}",
  "decision": "{{ $json.gate_decision }}",
  "combined_score": {{ $json.combined_score }},
  "qc_score": {{ $json.qc_score }},
  "ml_score": {{ $json.ml_score || 0 }},
  "reasons": {{ JSON.stringify($json.gate_reasons || []) }},
  "issues": {{ JSON.stringify($json.issues || []) }},
  "hallucination_rate": "{{ $json.hallucination_rate }}%",
  "project_id": "{{ $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.project_id }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

={
  "model": "bge-m3",
  "prompt": {{ JSON.stringify(
    'Перелинковка ' +
    $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.niche + ' ' +
    $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.city + ' ' +
    $('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.niche_cluster + ' ' +
    'ссылок:' + ($('Parse & Validate Links v2').first().json.links_count || 0) +
    ' типы:' + Object.keys($('Parse & Validate Links v2').first().json.type_distribution || {}).join(',') +
    ' кластеров:' + ($('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.clusters_count || 0) +
    ' QC:' + ($('Parse & Validate Links v2').first().json.qc_score || 0) +
    ' engines:' + ($('Build Links Prompt v4.0').first().json.priority_engines || 'both')
  ) }}
}
